channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 动画 公开 Japanese/English Casts
item.description: Japanese cast includes Momoka Terasawa, Akari Kito, Koki Uchiyama, Kentaro Tone ― The official website and X/Twitter account for the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 anime announced on Tuesday the Japanese... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Anime Reveals Japanese/English Casts

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network OceanVeil Stream Perfect Addiction Light 动画
item.description: Anime debuts on July 8 ― WWWave Corporation's anime streaming platform OceanVeil announced on Tuesday that it will stream the "light anime" adaptation of Kaoruko Miyama's Perfect Addiction boys-love... | 来源: ANN | 原文: OceanVeil to Stream Perfect Addiction 'Light Anime'

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Crunchyroll Stream One Piece Heroines, BanG Dream! Yume∞Mita, Frontier Lord Begins Zero Subjects, More 动画
item.description: Also: Iron Wok Jan!, Draw This, Then Die!, Red River, Recommendations from Iwamoto-Senpai, more ― Crunchyroll announced on Tuesday that it is also streaming the following titles for the summer 2026... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Crunchyroll to Stream One Piece Heroines, BanG Dream! Yume∞Mita, The Frontier Lord Begins with Zero Subjects, More Anime

item.title: [动画][续作] Anime News Network Marriage Toxin TV 动画 Gets 2nd 季度 2027
item.description: 2nd season announced at final episode of 1st season on Wednesday ― The final episode of the television anime for Jōmyaku and artist Mizuki Yoda's Marriage Toxin manga revealed on Wednesday that the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Marriage Toxin TV Anime Gets 2nd Season in 2027

item.title: [续作] MyAnimeList Marriagetoxin Gets 第二 季度 Winter 2027
item.description: The 13th and final episode of Marriagetoxin ended with an announcement on Tuesday that a second season is in production. The official website also revealed an announcement promo. The second season is... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Marriagetoxin' Gets Second Season in Winter 2027

item.title: [CAST] MyAnimeList Summer 2026 Simulcast List

The 10-episode anime series is scheduled to premiere worldwide... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2' Unveils Additional Staff, Second Teaser Promo [Update 6/30]
